name: Brandon Burlsworth Youth Center
description: Brandon Burlsworth Youth Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harrison, AR. There are 6 wood courts. 4 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — People with silver sneakers plan are free.

name: Creekside Rotary
description: Come play pickleball at Creekside Rotary in Harrison, AR! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
